name: Mixed Vegetables in Coconut Milk
recipeInstructions:
1. In a wok, bring water to a boil over high heat.
2. Add shallots and 1/4 cup coconut milk; return to a boil.
3. Add the vegetables and bring back to a boil.
4. Add sugar and salt; reduce heat to medium.
5. Simmer for 3 to 4 minutes, stirring constantly, until the vegetables are just tender.
6. Stir in the remaining coconut milk and cook over high heat for an additional minute.
7. Remove from heat. Garnish with basil leaves and serve.
